  obtain ⟨e, h₂, h₃⟩ := h_main

have h_main : ∃ e, q.as_extended = ok e ∧ (let X := Field51_as_Nat q.X; let Y := Field51_as_Nat q.Y; let Z := Field51_as_Nat q.Z; let T := Field51_as_Nat q.T; let X' := Field51_as_Nat e.X; let Y' := Field51_as_Nat e.Y; let Z' := Field51_as_Nat e.Z; let T' := Field51_as_Nat e.T; X' % p = (X * T) % p ∧ Y' % p = (Y * Z) % p ∧ Z' % p = (Z * T) % p ∧ T' % p = (X * Y) % p) := by
    have h₁ : q.as_extended = ok (⟨q.X * q.T, q.Y * q.Z, q.Z * q.T, q.X * q.Y⟩ : EdwardsPoint) := by

      have h₃ : (Field51_as_Nat (q.Y * q.Z)) % p = (Field51_as_Nat q.Y * Field51_as_Nat q.Z) % p := by

      have h₄ : (Field51_as_Nat (q.Z * q.T)) % p = (Field51_as_Nat q.Z * Field51_as_Nat q.T) % p := by
        rfl
      have h₅ : (Field51_as_Nat (q.X * q.Y)) % p = (Field51_as_Nat q.X * Field51_as_Nat q.Y) % p := by
        rfl
      simp_all [h₂, h₃, h₄, h₅]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try omega)
  
  obtain ⟨e, h₁, h₂⟩ := h_main
  refine' ⟨e, _, _⟩
  · -- Prove that as_extended q = ok e
